product_highlights: Mattewax® 511 — ultrafine polypropylene powder for elegant matte finish
MicroEase® — slip agents for improved spreadability
MicroSoft® — soft-focus powders for light diffusion
Versatile range for color cosmetics, creams, and lotions
notes: Micro Powders is a leading manufacturer of specialty wax and polymer powders for personal care and cosmetic applications. Their Mattewax® 511 is an ultrafine polypropylene powder that imparts an elegant matte finish to color cosmetics, creams, and lotions while improving wear resistance and providing a smooth, velvety skin feel. Micro Powders' extensive range of soft-focus and mattifying agents are used in premium foundations, primers, and skincare products worldwide, with global distribution through agents and distributors.
